notes: Chunks 31a+31b both complete 2026-06-06. 31a: Template D (Conversational Q&A), 25 routes Brazil/Indonesia/Malaysia/Mexico to Italy/Japan/Netherlands/Portugal/South Korea/Switzerland; Italy-to-South Korea; Thailand-to-South Korea. MAPA/BARANTAN/DVS/SENASICA export certs; EU non-listed FAVN titre + 90-day wait; Japan AQS 180-day; South Korea QIAS 5-10 days endemic / 1-3 days EU-origin. 31b: Template B (Visual Journey), 25 routes US-EU (Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Greece, Hungary, Norway, Poland, Romania, Sweden), US-non-EU (Argentina, Egypt, Kenya, Nigeria, Vietnam), UK-EU (Austria, Finland, Greece, Hungary, Poland, Romania), UK-non-EU (Argentina, Egypt, Kenya), VN-USA. Tapeworm for US/UK-Finland/Norway; SENASA+FCDO apostille for UK-AR; CDC high-risk for VN-US. Routes 5322 -> 5416, pages 6109 -> 6196. Tier A remaining: 140 -> 90. Next chunk 33 (Template C, Comparison Brief, Tier A). Blog Day 7 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
